common.welcomeBody: This web package now has a dashboard shell with TanStack Router, shadcn/ui, theme switching, and language switching.
common.welcomeHintOne: Use the sidebar to move between routes.
common.welcomeHintTwo: The users page keeps the React Query CRUD example.
common.welcomeHintThree: The realtime page keeps the SSE and WebSocket demos.
common.realtimeBody: SSE and WebSocket remain isolated here while the shell migration moves forward.
common.chatEmpty: Send a message to start chatting.
common.chatPlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
common.chatHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
